name: SubmitPlaylistUrl_AllSuccessPlaylist_ExpandsToItems
statusMessage:
Expected batch.Items to contain only items satisfying the inspector:
	At index 0:
		Expected item.Status to be the same string because PLtstOK00001 contains only success videos — item tstENMAN001 failed with: Insufficient credits: need 4, have 0, but they differ at index 0:
		   ↓ (actual)
		  "failed"
		  "completed"
		   ↑ (expected)

		   ↑ (expected)
